ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: MILK CHOCOLATE FLAVOUR COATING (52%) [SUGAR*; COCOA BUTTER; COCOA MASS; SKIMMED MILK POWDER; MILK FAT; LACTOSE (MILK); EMULSIFIERS, SOYA LECITHIN (E322), POLYGLYCEROL POLYRICINOLEATE (E476)]; PEANUT BUTTER CREME CENTER (48%) [PEANUTS; SUGAR*; DEXTROSE; SALT; ACIDITY REGULATOR, CITRIC ACID (E330), ANTIOXIDANT, TBHQ (E319)].
